areaLabel: Border Road and Border Fort Yard Slice
notes: Sixth real slice extends east from chapter-05 supply-court into a guarded border road and the first border-fort yard. Gameplay/content now closes a reusable clerk-order -> sentry-check -> gate warp -> healer recovery loop, while visual replacement stays in a separate chapter-local backlog. / 第六段真实切片从 chapter-05 的 supply-court 继续向东扩展到边关前路和第一层边营前院。当前 gameplay/content 已经收口出一条可复用的“文吏交代 -> 守兵验令 -> 营门放行 -> 医官整备”闭环，而视觉替换则继续放在独立的章节级 backlog 中并行推进。
title: Border Fort Approach
